(connect timeout=15)')) | World Bank searches performed: ['wastewater treatment', 'safely managed sanitation'] | Using World Bank proxy: SH.STA.SMSS.UR.ZS: Safely managed sanitation services, urban (% of urban pop) (substitution for IWA wastewater treatment capacity; no IWA data available). | Partial correlation computed via OLS residuals method (workaround for pingouin p-val bug): partial_r=-0.005, partial_p=0.9609, controlling for log(GPC). | Partial correlation used for summary only (not passed to determine_verdict): partial_r=-0.005, partial_p=0.9609
summary: Tested 'SH.STA.SMSS.UR.ZS: Safely managed sanitation services, urban (% of urban pop)' as proxy for wastewater treatment plant infrastructure capacity. This is an approximate substitution since IWA data is paid/inaccessible. Cross-sectional analysis (latest year per country, n=121 countries). Bivariate Pearson r=-0.514 (p=0.0000), Spearman rho=-0.767 (p=0.0000). Partial r=-0.005 (p=0.9609) controlling for log(GPC). Best functional form: linear. Direction is consistent with hypothesis (expected negative).
